# RAPPter Plays Pokemon warehouse

> A public-safe, read-only, Git-backed gameplay telemetry corpus.

- Registry: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rappter-plays-pokemon/refs/heads/story-warehouse/registry.json
- Status: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rappter-plays-pokemon/refs/heads/story-warehouse/api/v1/status.json
- Manifest: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rappter-plays-pokemon/refs/heads/story-warehouse/api/v1/manifest.json
- SQLite: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rappter-plays-pokemon/refs/heads/story-warehouse/v1/warehouse.db
- Execution receipts: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rappter-plays-pokemon/refs/heads/story-warehouse/v1/execution-receipts.jsonl
- Schema: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rappter-plays-pokemon/refs/heads/story-warehouse/v1/schema.sql

The static API supports GET/HEAD only. It contains no ROM, media, screenshots, raw model output, chat, identities, secrets, or paths.
